norm_text: in 1982, foreign investors owned about five percent of all u.s. corporate equity.
governments throughout the world own substantial positions in politically active u.s. companies.
saudi arabia plans to invest about $10 billion into companies, more than doubling its assets by 2025.
federal law does not address the issue of political spending by u.s. corporations that are partially owned by foreign investors.
ab 846 will provide a clear process to accelerate and streamline wildfire preparedness and vegetation management.
sb 596 sets a 2045 target date in california for carbon neutral cement and concrete, with a 40% emissions reduction by 2030.
transportation is the greatest source of greenhouse gas emissions in california.
